case_title: MARTIN R. HERNANDEZ VS. CARLOS CORTEZ

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, MARTIN R. AS TO DEFENDANT CORTEZ, CARLOS AN INDIVIDUAL AKA JUAN CARLOS AKA CARLOS CORTES JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
